name: Mirapakaya Bajji
steps: Slit the bajji chillies, remove the seeds, and rub a little salt inside.
Whisk besan, rice flour, carom seeds, chilli powder, soda and salt with water into a thick coating batter.
Dip each chilli in the batter and deep fry in hot oil until golden and puffed.
Drain, split open, and stuff with chopped onion, coriander and a squeeze of lemon.
Serve hot — the classic rainy-day roadside bajji.
